title: Elytra Steamer
description: Fly at hight speed in your world, spreading smokes using the Elytra Steamer! Craft Gas Station to refuel. Multiplayer compatible!
body:
Fly at hight speed in your world, spreading smokes using the Elytra Steamer! Craft Gas Station to refuel. Multiplayer compatible! ## Main features - Engine ON/OFF - Jetpack thrust type - Submersible thrust type - Elytra thrust type - Gas stations (craft) to refuel your elytra - Sound barrier bang, ground combustions, shutdowns - 10+ HUD displays ## Crafting **Elytra Steamer**: Drop an **elytra + lava bucket + blast furnace** ON a crafting table. The Elytra will be instant forge to the new Steamer version ! **Gas Station**: Drop a **coal block + lava bucket + dispenser** WHERE you want your gas station. The Gas Station allow you to refill your fuel faster ! (stay close to the station with your engine OFF) **X** Throw a water bucket on a Gas Station to remove it. ## Manual - **Engine ON**: look down, and sneak for a couple of seconds. - **Engine OFF**: look top, and sneak (at 0 thrust). - **Thrust**: hold sneak. - **Swim**: hold sneak AND jump button to stay stable when swiming. - **Burst**: quick thrust when you are >80% of your maximum thrust. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkes:options/get``` ## Warnings - DO NOT PLAY IN PEACEFULL: it requires Magma Cubes to spawn. - Because of the hight speed and a huge amount of particules, this datapack require a pretty good CPU! If you are currently playing on Slow Motion, you should disabled particules in the datapack options ! (see options menu) - Try it on a new world before poluting your survival world!

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
